folio.label: 199v
folio.l: And we also , to bere hi~ compaignye
¢ And whil we sekyn , thilke diuinitee

note.notetxt: 316 Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.Est

folio.l: That is I hid , in heuene pryuely
Algate I brent in this world , shuln we be
To whom Cecile answerde , boldely
Men mygúten dredyn wel , and skylfully
This lyf to lese , myn owne deere brother
If this were lyuyng oonly , & noon other
¢ But there is better lyf , in other place

note.notetxt: 323Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: That neuäe shal be lost , ne drede the nougút
Whicú goddes sone , vs tolde , thurgú his grace
That fadres sone , hatú alle thynges wrougút
And al æ wrougút is , w a skilful thougút
The goost æ fro the fader , gan procede
Hatú sowled hem , w outen any drede
¢ By word & by myracle , he goddes sone

note.notetxt: 330Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Whan he was in this world , declared heere
That æäe was other lyf , æäe men may wone
To whom answerde Tiburce , o Suster deere
Ne seydestow rigút now , in this manere
There nas but o god , lord in sootúfastnesse
And now of three , how maistow bere wytnesse
¢ That shal I telle quod she , er I go

note.notetxt: 337Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Rigút as a man , hatú sapiences three
Memorie , engyn , and Intellect also
So in oo beyng , of diuinitee
Thre ¹sones , may there , rigút wel be
Tho gan she hi~ , ful bisily to preche
Of Cristes sone , and of his peynes teche
¢ And manye poyntes , of his passiou~

note.notetxt: 344Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: How goddes sone , in this world was w holde
To doon mankynde , pleyn remyssiou~
That was I bounde , in sy~ne , & cares colde
Al this thyng , she vn to Tiburce tolde
And after this , Tiburce in good entente
Witú valerian , to Pope vrban he wente
¢ That thanked god , & w glad herte & ligút

note.notetxt: 351Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: He céstned hi~ , and mad hi~ in that place
Parfyt in his lernynge , goddes knygút
And after this , Tiburce gat swicú grace
That euäy day , he sey in tyme and space
The Aungel of god , and euery maner boone
That he god axed , it was sped ful soone

note.notetxt: 357Last three lines crammed in? Double check.ODR
